stocks.comment: The fraction of capital in agriculture.

stocks.name: Natural Resources
stocks.comment: The amount of natural resources remaining.

flows.comment: Net flow for Capital Agriculture Fraction

variables.name: Step Check time
variables.comment: Step Check time

variables.name: birth rate
variables.comment: birth rate

variables.name: death rate
variables.comment: death rate

variables.name: net pop growth rate
variables.comment: net pop growth rate

variables.name: deaths
variables.comment: The worldwide number of deaths occurring.
variables.equation: Population * IF( TIME > switch_time_3 , death_rate_normal_1 , death_rate_normal ) * deaths_material_multiplier * deaths_pollution_multiplier * deaths_food_multiplier * deaths_crowding_multiplier

variables.name: births
variables.comment: The total number of births.
variables.equation: Population * IF( TIME > switch_time_1 , birth_rate_normal_1 , birth_rate_normal ) * births_material_multiplier * births_crowding_multiplier * births_food_multiplier * births_pollution_multiplier

variables.name: birth rate normal
variables.comment: The normal fractional birth rate.

variables.name: birth rate normal 1
variables.comment: The alternate normal fractional birth rate.

variables.name: births crowding multiplier
variables.comment: The effect of crowding on the number of births.

variables.name: births food multiplier
variables.comment: The effect of food on the number of births.

variables.name: births material multiplier
variables.comment: The effect of the material standard of living on births.

variables.name: births pollution multiplier
variables.comment: The effect of pollution on the number of births.

variables.name: capital agriculture fraction adjustment time
variables.comment: The time to adjust the fraction of capital in agriculture.

variables.name: capital agriculture fraction indicated
variables.comment:
The fraction of capital that should be agricultural as
		         indicated by
		         the availability of food.

variables.name: capital agriculture fraction initial
variables.comment: The fraction of capital in agriculture initially.

variables.name: capital agriculture fraction normal
variables.comment: The fraction of capital investment devoted to agriculture.

variables.name: capital depreciation
variables.comment: The rate at which the capital stock depreciates.
variables.equation: Capital * IF( TIME > switch_time_5 , capital_depreciation_normal_1 , capital_depreciation_normal )

variables.name: capital depreciation normal
variables.comment: The fractional rate at which the capital stock degrades.

variables.name: capital depreciation normal 1
variables.comment:
The alternative fractional rate at which the capital stock
		         degrades.

variables.name: capital initial
variables.comment: The initial capital stock.

variables.name: capital investment rate normal 1
variables.comment: The normal per capita rate of capital investment.

variables.name: capital investment
variables.comment: The gross amount of investment in capital.
variables.equation: Population * capital_investment_multiplier * IF( TIME > switch_time_4 , capital_investment_rate_normal_1 , capital_investment_rate_normal )

variables.name: capital investment from quality ratio
variables.comment: Capital investment from quality.

variables.name: capital investment multiplier
variables.comment:
Multiplier for the effect of the material standard of
		         living on
		         capital investment.

variables.name: capital investment rate normal
variables.comment: The normal per capita rate of capital investment.

variables.name: capital ratio
variables.comment: The capital investment ratio (per capita investment).

variables.name: capital ratio agriculture
variables.comment: The capital investment ratio in agriculure.

variables.name: crowding
variables.comment:
The ratio oioulation to normally supportable population
		         used as a
		         measure of crowding.

variables.name: death rate normal
variables.comment: The normal fractional rate of death.

variables.name: death rate normal 1
variables.comment: The alternate normal fractional rate of death.

variables.name: deaths crowding multiplier
variables.comment: The effect of crowding on the number of deaths.

variables.name: deaths food multiplier
variables.comment: The effect of food on the number of deaths.

variables.name: deaths material multiplier
variables.comment: The effect of the material standard of living on deaths.

variables.name: deaths pollution multiplier
variables.comment: The effect of pollution on the number of deaths.

variables.name: effective capital ratio normal
variables.comment: The effective ratio between capital and investment.

variables.name: effective capital ratio
variables.comment: The effective ratio between capital and investment.

variables.name: food coefficient
variables.comment: Coeffecient for diddling the food supply.

variables.name: food coefficient 1
variables.comment: Alternative coeffecient for diddling the food supply.

variables.name: food crowding multiplier
variables.comment: The effect of crowding on the production of food.

variables.name: food per capita normal
variables.comment: The normal amount of food required for an individual.

variables.name: food per capita potential
variables.comment:
The potential amount of food that can be grown based on
		         capital
		         investment.

variables.name: food pollution multiplier
variables.comment: The effect of pollution on the ability to grow food.

variables.name: food ratio
variables.comment: The ration of food available to required food.
variables.equation: food_per_capita_potential * food_crowding_multiplier * food_pollution_multiplier * IF( TIME > switch_time_7 , food_coefficient_1 , food_coefficient ) / food_per_capita_normal

variables.name: land area
variables.comment: The total amount of habitable land.

variables.name: material standard of living
variables.comment: The relative material standard of living.

variables.name: natural resource fraction remaining
variables.comment: The fraction of natural resource still remaining.

variables.name: nat res matl multiplier
variables.comment:
The effect of the material well being on natural resource
		         use.

variables.name: natural resource utilization normal
variables.comment: The normal rate of natural resources.

variables.name: natural resource utilization normal 1
variables.comment: The normal rate of natural resources.

variables.name: natural resource extraction multiplier
variables.comment:
The multiplier on effective capital investment from
		         remaining natural
		         resources.

variables.name: natural resource utilization
variables.comment: The rate of natural resource utilization.
variables.equation: Population * IF( TIME > switch_time_2 , natural_resource_utilization_normal_1 , natural_resource_utilization_normal ) * nat_res_matl_multiplier

variables.name: natural resources initial
variables.comment: The amount of natual resource initially available.

variables.name: pollution absorption
variables.comment:
The rate at which pollution is reincorporated into the
		         ecology.

variables.name: pollution absorption time
variables.comment:
The time it takes to incorporate pollution back into the
		         environment.

variables.name: pollution capital multiplier
variables.comment: The effect of capital on pollution generation.

variables.name: pollution generation
variables.comment: The rate at which non-ncorporate poltion changes.
variables.equation: Population * IF( TIME > switch_time_6 , pollution_per_capita_normal , pollution_per_capita_normal_1 ) * pollution_capital_multiplier

variables.name: pollution initial
variables.comment: The amount of non-incorporated pollution initially.

variables.name: pollution per capita normal
variables.comment: The amount of pollution produced by a person in a year.

variables.name: pollution per capita normal 1
variables.comment:
The alternative amount of pollution produced by a person in
		         a year.

variables.name: pollution ratio
variables.comment: The ration of pollution to standard.

variables.name: pollution standard
variables.comment: The standard amount of non-incorporated pollution.

variables.name: population density normal
variables.comment: The normal density of population.

variables.name: population initial
variables.comment: The world population at the beginning of the simulation.

variables.comment: The effect of crowding on the quality of life.

variables.comment: The effect of food on the quality of life.

variables.comment:
The effect of the material standard of living on the

variables.comment: The quality of life.

variables.name: quality of life normal
variables.comment: The standard quality of life.

variables.name: quality pollution multiplier
variables.comment: The effect of pollution on the quality of life.

variables.name: switch time 1
variables.comment: The time at which the birth rate normal switches

variables.name: switch time 2
variables.comment:
The time at which to swithc the natural rate of resource
		         utilization.

variables.name: switch time 3
variables.comment: The time at which to switch the death rate.

variables.name: switch time 4
variables.comment: The time at which to switch the capital investment rate.

variables.name: switch time 5
variables.comment: The time at which to swithc the capital depreciation rate.

variables.name: switch time 6

variables.name: switch time 7
